title: Flicky (1984)
summary: I own a Bally/Midway arcade cabinet of the SEGA game Flicky from 1984. So, I decided to make a Tumblr blog all about the game. Check it out flicky1984.tumblr.com
content:
I own a Bally/Midway arcade cabinet of the SEGA game Flicky from 1984.

So, I decided to make a Tumblr blog all about the game.

Check it out flicky1984.tumblr.com
